//: Copy this to ~/.config/gpu-monitor/config.json (or set $GPUMON_CONFIG) and edit.
//hosts: Your remote GPU servers. 'ssh' is the target passed to ssh — INCLUDE YOUR USERNAME (user@host). Passwordless SSH (keys) must already work.
//vpn: OPTIONAL. Delete this whole block if the servers don't need a VPN. Only 'cisco' (Cisco Secure Client) is supported; 'network' is your VPN's internal IPv4 prefix used as a routing-table fallback.
